name: rl-developer-memory
description: Local-first RL developer memory MCP package for Codex with SQLite-backed retrieval and operational tooling.

interface.shortDescription: RL-aware, local-first developer memory MCP for Codex with retrieval, feedback, and operational controls.
interface.longDescription: rl-developer-memory stores reusable debugging and RL/control troubleshooting knowledge in local SQLite and provides ranked issue matching, feedback learning, preference/guardrail workflows, and health/operations tooling for reliable daily Codex usage.
